title: Constipation during pregnancy
excerpt: Why constipation is common, fiber and fluid strategies, safe movement, and when laxatives need medical guidance.
content:
## Why it happens

Progesterone slows gut motility; iron supplements and less activity contribute.

## Supportive steps

- Drink water throughout the day.
- Fiber: vegetables, fruit, beans, oats, prunes in moderation.
- Walk daily if approved.
- Respond to urge; allow unhurried bathroom time.

## Notes

Ask before using laxatives or herbal teas. Severe abdominal pain or blood in stool needs medical review — not typical constipation.
